requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety (SON / NIS — IEC 62368-1 basis; 220-240 V / 50 Hz; Type D/G Plug)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全（SON / NIS——基于IEC 62368-1；220-240V/50Hz；D/G型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全（SON / NIS——基於IEC 62368-1；220-240V/50Hz；D/G型插頭）

summary.en: Nigeria operates on 220-240 V / 50 Hz. Standard plug types are Type D (BS 546 large round 3-pin) and Type G (BS 1363 rectangular 3-pin). SON conformity assessment (SONCAP) covers electrical safety via NIS standards based on IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1 for audio/video and IT equipment. CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Nigeria. Mains-connected wireless devices must comply with applicable NIS electrical safety standards and carry the SONCAP Certificate.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚使用220-240V/50Hz电源。标准插头类型为D型（BS 546大型圆柱三芯）和G型（BS 1363矩形三芯）。SON符合性评估（SONCAP）通过基于IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1的NIS标准涵盖音视频及IT设备的电气安全。尼日利亚不承认CCC电气安全认证。连接电网的无线设备须符合适用的NIS电气安全标准并持有SONCAP证书。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞使用220-240V/50Hz電源。標準插頭類型為D型（BS 546大型圓柱三芯）和G型（BS 1363矩形三芯）。SON符合性評估（SONCAP）透過基於IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1的NIS標準涵蓋音視頻及IT設備的電氣安全。尼日利亞不承認CCC電氣安全認證。連接電網的無線設備須符合適用的NIS電氣安全標準並持有SONCAP證書。

standards_or_laws: SON SONCAP (SON Conformity Assessment Programme) — electrical safety scope
Plug standard: BS 546 Type D / BS 1363 Type G

summary.en: China CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety for IT and AV equipment under GB 4943.1 (based on IEC 60950-1) or GB 62368-1 (IEC 62368-1 basis). China mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz. Standard Chinese plug types (Type A two-flat-pin and Type I oblique-flat-pin) are not compatible with Nigerian Type D or Type G sockets.
summary.zh: 中国CCC（中国强制认证）依据GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1）或GB 62368-1（基于IEC 62368-1）涵盖IT和音视频设备的电气安全。中国电网为220V/50Hz。中国标准插头类型（A型两扁插和I型斜扁插）与尼日利亚D型或G型插座不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國CCC（中國強制認證）依據GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1）或GB 62368-1（基於IEC 62368-1）涵蓋IT和音視頻設備的電氣安全。中國電網為220V/50Hz。中國標準插頭類型（A型兩扁插和I型斜扁插）與尼日利亞D型或G型插座不相容。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — electrical safety scope

gap.en: CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by SON/Nigeria. SONCAP certificate covering electrical safety is required at import. Chinese plug types (Type A, Type I) are incompatible with Nigerian Type D/G sockets — product must be adapted or sold with appropriate plug or adapter for mains-connected devices. Voltage (220 V) and frequency (50 Hz) are compatible.
gap.zh: SON/尼日利亚不承认CCC电气安全认证。进口时须提交涵盖电气安全的SONCAP证书。中国插头类型（A型、I型）与尼日利亚D/G型插座不兼容——连接电网的设备须适配或附带适配插头或转换器销售。电压（220V）和频率（50Hz）兼容。
gap.zht: SON/尼日利亞不承認CCC電氣安全認證。進口時須提交涵蓋電氣安全的SONCAP證書。中國插頭類型（A型、I型）與尼日利亞D/G型插座不相容——連接電網的設備須適配或附帶適配插頭或轉換器銷售。電壓（220V）和頻率（50Hz）相容。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates are not accepted in Nigeria. A SONCAP Certificate covering electrical safety is required at customs. Mains-connected devices must use or be supplied with Type D or Type G plugs compatible with Nigerian 220-240 V / 50 Hz sockets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC电气安全证书在尼日利亚不被接受。海关须提交涵盖电气安全的SONCAP证书。连接电网的设备须使用或附带与尼日利亚220-240V/50Hz插座兼容的D型或G型插头。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC電氣安全證書在尼日利亞不被接受。海關須提交涵蓋電氣安全的SONCAP證書。連接電網的設備須使用或附帶與尼日利亞220-240V/50Hz插座相容的D型或G型插頭。
